pages.text: $(li)Read $(l:face_configuration/opening_the_gui)Face Configuration Guide$() for detailed GUI walkthrough $(li)Learn about $(l:state_machine_guide/state_overview)State Machine$() for understanding transitions $(li)Explore $(l:cached_production/what_is_cached_production)Cached Production$() to understand the math $(li)Check $(l:troubleshooting/installation_issues)Troubleshooting$() if something doesn't work
